abilities.description: Sven unleashes his magical gauntlet that deals damage and stuns enemy units in a small area around the target.
abilities.name: Storm Hammer
abilities.story: The Rogue Knight's iron gauntlet, taken from the school of his father, strikes his foes to their core.

abilities.description: Sven strikes with great force, cleaving all nearby enemy units with his attack.
abilities.name: Great Cleave
abilities.story: The Vigil Knights still seek to reclaim the stolen Outcast Blade from Sven, a weapon capable of cutting wide swaths through lesser warriors.

abilities.description: Sven's Warcry heartens his allied heroes for battle, increasing their armor and movement speed. Lasts 10 seconds.
params: Passive Component[picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] Aura Radius: 1200[picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] Move Speed Bonus: 3%[picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] Aura Armor Bonus: 6[picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] Aura Linger Duration: 0.5
abilities.name: Warcry
abilities.story: Calling a few lines from the Vigil Codex fortifies Sven's obedience to his rogue code. So poetic!

abilities.description: Sven channels his rogue strength, granting bonus damage and slow resistance for 35 seconds.
abilities.name: God's Strength
abilities.story: With the strength that shattered the Sacred Helm, the Rogue Knight stands unopposed in melee combat.

description: Cleaves down enemies with his incredible strength. The Rogue Knight lives by two creeds: Honor, as ordained by his own personal code, and Solitude. Always eager to charge into a fight. Using his iron gauntlet, he launches a Storm Hammer, stunning grouped enemies as he transports himself into battle, then closes in to cut them down with Great Cleave. Letting out a truly frightening Warcry, he ignites and calls upon God's Strength, a few swings of his gargantuan sword are often more than enough to slay on his hapless foes.  Carry Disabler Initiator Durable Nuker  NicePecs, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Sven is named after Danish bodybuilder and actor Sven-Ole Thorsen. In earlier versions of DotA, Sven had the fun name "Arnold Schwarzenegger".
In earlier versions of DotA, Sven had the fun name "Arnold Schwarzenegger".
